agents.name: team-lead
agents.description: Decomposes work, assigns tasks to subagents, enforces file ownership and status protocol

agents.name: architect
agents.description: Owns system boundaries, ADRs, schema migrations, and decisions that are expensive to reverse

agents.name: backend-engineer
agents.description: Implements Koa endpoints, TypeScript service logic, migrations, and Jest tests

agents.name: code-reviewer
agents.description: Runs spec compliance gate first, then code quality gate. Returns APPROVED / APPROVED_WITH_NOTES / CHANGES_REQUIRED
